name: cove-cast
title: CoveCast
description: Copy a token contract address anywhere, hit a hotkey, auto-detect the chain, pick a USD amount, and open the matching Cove Telegram bot deeplink.
author: bitski

commands.name: buy
commands.title: Buy
commands.subtitle: CoveCast
commands.description: Detect the chain for the contract address on your clipboard and open a Cove buy deeplink.

commands.name: quick-buy
commands.title: Quick Buy
commands.subtitle: CoveCast
commands.description: Instantly buy your Quick Buy amount of the contract address on your clipboard — no UI.

preferences.name: amounts
preferences.title: Buy Amounts (USD)
preferences.description: Comma-separated USD amounts. Each must fit Cove's format: max 9999 and at most 4 characters incl. the decimal (e.g. 25, 0.5, 9999 — 100.5 is too long).

preferences.name: quickBuyAmount
preferences.title: Quick Buy Amount (USD)
preferences.description: USD amount Quick Buy fires in one keystroke. Max 9999, at most 4 characters incl. the decimal (e.g. 25, 0.5).

preferences.name: defaultBuyAction
preferences.title: Default Buy Action
preferences.description: What picking an amount does: buy it instantly, or open Cove's buy panel to confirm first.
